title: Useott's Bushy Leaves - Vanilla Textures
description: Simple bushy leaves, compatible with most resource packs!
body:
IT'S FINALLY UPDATED! (Unless you are on Modrinth, which I'm sorry you missed out on a few months of waiting)

A bushy leaves pack intended to be very simple, and look good at the same time! This is the vanilla textures edition, which is compatible with most custom leaves textures! If you are using the vanilla textures (not programmer art, sorry), then please use the custom textures version, found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/useotts-bushy-leaves-custom-textures).
